items.visual_description: A solid black, ribbed-knit camisole crop top featuring thin spaghetti straps and a V-neckline. The neckline has a distinct pointed detail at the center of the V.

overall_description: This is a minimalist black camisole crop top made from a ribbed fabric. It has a form-fitting silhouette with slender spaghetti straps and a V-shaped neckline, making it a versatile basic piece.
